note: Immortal Boss — PvP weekly leaderboard event. Available Tuesdays and Saturdays. Source: PvpWeeklyBossPanel.cs + Enemy.cs + DataManager.cs.

leagues.name: Bronze League
leagues.immunePenaltyNote: No damage penalty — immune modifier has no effect in Bronze.

leagues.name: Silver League
leagues.immunePenaltyNote: Heroes of the immune class deal 50% reduced damage (÷2). Confirmed in Enemy.cs line 4464.

leagues.name: Gold League
leagues.immunePenaltyNote: Heroes of the immune class deal 50% reduced damage (÷2). Confirmed in Enemy.cs line 4464.

leagues.name: Diamond League
leagues.immunePenaltyNote: Heroes of the immune class deal 0 damage (100% penalty). Not directly in client damage code — may be enforced server-side or via score submission.

immuneModifier.note: Rotates each event (Tue → Sat → Tue → …). Cycle: immuneMelee → immuneMage → immuneRange → none → repeat. Server-controlled via pvpBossVersionId. Applied via pvpBossModifier field on PvpWeeklyBossPanel.

promotion.note: Top 3 (ranks 1–3) promote to next league. Rank 8 (last) demotes. Diamond has no promotion. Bronze has no demotion. From PvpWeeklyBossPanel.cs line 396: HOKIKBHEKIK <= 2 → promote, HOKIKBHEKIK == 7 → demote (0-indexed rank).

rewardTickets.note: getRewardTickets(league, rank) from PvpWeeklyBossPanel.cs line 1086. rank is 0-indexed (0 = 1st place). With IAP active (iapPvpBossBoost temporary OR iapPvpBossBoostPerm permanent), all values ×2.

rewardTrophies.note: Trophy rewards scale with the player's tournament tier (1–35, same tier system as tournament_brackets.json) and their personal getTournTrophies() multiplier. Source: getMaxRewardTrophy() + getMinRewardTrophy() in PvpWeeklyBossPanel.cs. Verified against in-game screenshots.

rankFormulas.note: rank is 1-indexed (1 = 1st place, 8 = last). Compute max and min first, then interpolate.

rewardTrophies.iapNote: With IAP active, apply ×2 to both max and min before computing per-rank values. The min fallback of 100 becomes 200 with IAP.

getTournTrophies.note: BKNDFEKHIPG() in DDACKPKBCIF.cs. Base = 1.0, then multiplicative bonuses from player upgrades.
